operator_explanation.current_status: Blocked umbrella evidence record for storage-intent successor or comparator wording.
operator_explanation.plain_language: TideFS does not currently have evidence-backed permission to describe itself as an OpenZFS, Ceph, DRBD, local-filesystem, clustered-storage, successor, superior, or comparator-performance winner.

split_claims.operator_effect: Local successor and comparator wording remains refused.
Distributed successor and comparator wording remains refused.

what_is_proven: The current registered local and distributed split evidence manifests are present and digest-matched.

The storage-intent policy, placement, media, cost, scheduler, satisfaction, data-shape, layout, decision-frontier, result/refusal, preflight, rollout, tenant-isolation, temporal, and evidence-query boundaries have a source-model claim review.
The umbrella refusal can be rendered without substituting umbrella prose for blocked split claims.
residual_limitations: No matched incumbent measurement set establishes equivalent workloads, operations, media, topology, queueing, durability floors, costs, or failure envelopes.

No artifact here proves mounted local comparator behavior, multi-process distributed comparator behavior, production availability, release readiness, broad durability, geo/RPO, or OpenZFS/Ceph-class fulfillment.
Source-model manifest success means the evidence record is well formed; it does not mean the registered claim is admitted.
TideFS remains pre-alpha, and product-facing status stays behind current claim registry admission.

refusal_states.operator_meaning: The evidence cut is incomplete, stale, contradictory, unavailable, redacted beyond use, or compacted beyond the proof need; no comparator conclusion is legal.
Admission, rollout, capacity, repair, source retirement, or another hard gate prevents a claim conclusion; retry conditions must remain explicit.
The requested comparison has no legal result for its policy, workload, topology, media, fault, or caller scope.
An explicitly weaker or volatile mode may be visible, but it cannot strengthen a receipt or support durability, availability, successor, or comparator wording.
Conflicting request or delivery evidence prevents a stable answer and cannot be compressed into success.

required_visibility: earned receipt or source receipt set
missing, stale, corrupt, or lagging targets
repair, rebuild, catch-up, or source-retirement obligations
RPO, RTO, freshness, membership, fencing, and quorum limits
whether bytes or acknowledgment completion remain legal
degraded_visible_behavior.claim_boundary: A degraded-visible result is an operator truth surface for the exact scope, not permission to claim equivalence, superiority, availability, or successor status.

non_comparable_envelopes: Local mounted and distributed or clustered modes cannot substitute for each other.
FUSE, mounted-kernel VFS, block export, cache, volatile RAM, PMem, local devices, remote media, TCP, and RDMA results remain separate envelopes.

Workload, operation mix, queue depth, concurrency, durability floor, media, topology, tenant isolation, cost, wear, fault injection, recovery, and measurement attribution must match before comparison.
Average throughput, single-row latency, warm-cache hits, media labels, row names, issue closure, and source-model passes are not comparator admission.
Release-candidate, production-readiness, durability, availability, geo/RPO, and OpenZFS/Ceph-class conclusions are outside this artifact.
operator_explanation.safe_current_wording: The storage-intent successor/comparator umbrella claim is blocked; its local and distributed split claims are also blocked, so no product-facing successor or comparator conclusion is available.
unsafe_current_wording: TideFS is an OpenZFS, Ceph, DRBD, ext4/XFS, local-filesystem, or clustered-storage successor or replacement.
TideFS is superior, equivalent, faster, safer, more available, or more cost-effective than an incumbent outside a validated exact envelope.
A source-model pass, benchmark label, prototype row, or absence of refusal proves product admission.

residual_risk: This JSON file is a machine-oriented evidence artifact, not a new runtime operator command or default operator format.
Future operator output must revalidate live policy, evidence-cut freshness, split claim status, degraded state, and authorization before rendering an answer.
